philosophy_summary: Science becomes emotional when the impossible is solved through curiosity, pressure, and companionship.
core_beliefs: The universe is indifferent, but people can still be brave.
Curiosity is stronger than fear when a problem becomes tangible.
Humor keeps tension from breaking the human core of the scene.

scene_archetypes.name: 이해 불가능한 문제를 푸는 순간
scene_archetypes.meaning: Pressure focuses the mind until understanding arrives one piece at a time.
scene_archetypes.philosophy_note: 압박 속에서 이해가 한 조각씩 쌓이며 불가능이 문제로 바뀌는 순간

scene_archetypes.name: 낯선 지성과의 협업
scene_archetypes.meaning: Fear relaxes because shared problem-solving creates trust before language fully does.
scene_archetypes.philosophy_note: 두려움보다 문제 해결의 리듬이 먼저 우정을 만든다
